title: centaurea triumfettii subsp. pirinensis
intro: Centaurea triumfettii subsp. pirinensis, also known as Pirin knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as support for the immune system. Centaurea triumfettii subsp. pirinensis is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used to make medicinal teas and capsules.
